setup: Colonel Müller attacks with 1 T1 Infantry + 5 T1 Marksman against Alpaca's 1 T1 Infantry + 1 T1 Marksman.

specials.notes: Only Vulcanus Skill 1's trigger count is visible. Skills 2 and 3 are outside the supplied crop and were not inferred.

notes: T1 icon mapping applied exactly as supplied by Martin: green cap = Infantry, blue steel helmet = Lancer, brown hood = Marksman.
Attacker composition: 1 T1 Infantry, 5 T1 Marksman.
Defender composition: exactly 1 T1 Infantry and 1 T1 Marksman.
Attacker Gatot Skill 2 triggered 33 times; defender Gatot Skill 2 triggered 40 times.
The two Gatot Skill 2 counts differ, so no exact common round count was forced.
The attacker Marksman hero slot is explicitly shown as vacant.
Only Vulcanus Skill 1 = 1 trigger is visible; the lower Vulcanus skill rows were not guessed.
Source location: PDF page 1, report 3 from left.

manual_overrides: Defender display name recorded as Alpaca based on Martin's prior clarification.
The user-supplied T1 icon mapping was applied to distinguish Infantry, Lancer, and Marksman.
Marksman Health values were cross-referenced from the prior verified identical Alpaca/Müller stat panel because the current PDF crops cut off that final row.
